title: EOT Code Settings
description: Configuration settings for dynamic EOT code generation and validation.

dynamicEotCodeExpirationMinutes.title: EOT Code Expiration Minutes
dynamicEotCodeExpirationMinutes.description: The number of minutes before a generated dynamic EOT code expires. Default is 15 minutes.

enableDynamicEotCodeStoreValidation.title: Enable EOT Code Store Validation
enableDynamicEotCodeStoreValidation.description: When true, validates that the store ID in the dynamic EOT code generation request matches the authenticated business unit.

enableDynamicEotCodeExpirationValidation.title: Enable EOT Code Expiration Validation
enableDynamicEotCodeExpirationValidation.description: When true, validates that the dynamic EOT code has not expired during validation requests.
